steps.title: Focus on the requested group
steps.content: The student's goal is to specify who may have first populated the Azores according to the 2015 study. The relevant notes say that Vikings from Scandinavia may have populated the islands as early as the ninth century.

steps.title: Reject indirect note use
steps.content: Choice A reports the older historical belief rather than the study's claim. Choice B says Portuguese mariners may not have been first but does not name who was. Choice C gives mouse evidence instead of specifying the human group. The answer is D.
